name: A world where "Free use" SEX is Legal: Lustrum
description:
Not your typical FREE USE world — This one has a detailed built in open world simulation that makes you feel like you're playing GTA or some shit like that, I won't reveal it here check it out yourself ;)

Baisc premise: Lustrum is a world where unfettered male sexual access to females has become the norm, with the "free use" law enabling men to indulge their desires at any time, anywhere. This law was introduced in response to declining global birth rates, with the aim of boosting population growth. Women embrace this reality with casual indifference, seamlessly integrating frequent intimate encounters into their daily lives. Society has adapted, with all sectors promoting and accommodating this sexual liberation, resulting in a culture where vulgarity and curses punctuate everyday discourse.
creator: Twilight69
